ListItem.Para: Valve is deactivated closed.
Opposite trim air pressure regulator valve operates normally.
EDTO is not conducted.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Deactivate the associated flight deck trim valve closed (AMM DDG 21-61-01).

ListItem.Para: For left flight deck zone trim valve:
Set the left air conditioning pack OFF.
Set the GND TEST selector to ENABLE no less than 30-seconds prior to opening the Pack Control Unit circuit breakers.
Open the following circuit breakers and lock with a DO NOT CLOSE tag.
PACK CTRL UNIT- CHAN L1
PACK CTRL UNIT- CHAN L2
Gain access to flight deck trim valve.
Disconnect, cap and stow the electrical connector from the left flight deck trim valve.

Note.Para: The TRIM VALVE FLIGHT DECK L message will be displayed.

ListItem.Para: Turn the manual open/close knob until the valve position indicator is in the closed position.
Close the following circuit breakers:
PACK CTRL UNIT- CHAN L1
PACK CTRL UNIT- CHAN L2
Return the GND TEST selector to NORM.
Set the pack as desired.
For right flight deck zone trim valve:
Set the right air conditioning pack OFF.
Set the GND TEST selector to ENABLE no less than 30-seconds prior to opening the Pack Control Unit circuit breakers.
Open the following circuit breakers and lock with a DO NOT CLOSE tag.
PACK CTRL UNIT- CHAN R1
PACK CTRL UNIT- CHAN R2
Gain access to flight deck trim valve.
Disconnect, cap and stow the electrical connector from the right flight deck trim valve.

Note.Para: The TRIM VALVE FLIGHT DECK R message will be displayed.

ListItem.Para: Turn the manual open/close knob until the valve position indicator is in the closed position.
Close the following circuit breakers:
PACK CTRL UNIT- CHAN R1
PACK CTRL UNIT- CHAN R2
Return the GND TEST selector to NORM.
Set the pack as desired.

OperationNote.Para: If cabin or flight deck temperatures become too cool, climbing to a higher altitude will increase the heating capability of the air conditioning system.
